scripts.dev:worker: npm --prefix frontend run build && npx esbuild worker/index.js --bundle --format=esm --platform=neutral --outfile=frontend/dist/_worker.js && wrangler pages dev frontend/dist
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npx esbuild worker/index.js --bundle --format=esm --platform=neutral --outfile=frontend/dist/_worker.js
scripts.deploy: CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=1958a44c637f9061a6cf574141164146 npm run build && wrangler pages deploy frontend/dist --project-name schengenerator
